texts.full_text: official ballot language describing a proposed commission to redraw legislative lines after each census. Noting that the four leaders of the state legislature will appoint eight members and that those legislativors have full veto power over any changes, it's hard not be suspicious about their independence. The editorial highlights concerns regarding how "independent" may mislead voters into believing a certain level of neutrality or impartiality in this process. The involvement from four leaders who can potentially influence the commission members and exercise control makes such an assumption unfounded—the word “independent” here might not be entirely accurate. The use of language on ballot measures is crucial as it directly impacts how voters understand proposals, which could sway their decisions one way or another. Therefore any term that carries implications should indeed reflect the reality being described to avoid misleading people who are exercising what's considered a fundamental right in democracies: voting based upon clear and accurate information. This criticism from The Syracuse Post-Standard is an example of how media outlets can play significant roles not only as sources for news, but also by scrutinizing language used on ballot measures which could impact democratic processes. It shows the importance that transparency has within such procedures to ensure fair representation across different levels in government and respecting voter's rights. This matter serves both a practical purpose of informating public discourse about political issues at hand as well an ethical one, emphasizes upon accountability for language used on official documents which can have substantial impact over people’s lives. It also reflects the need to strive towards clear communication that doesn't mislead or distort reality—an important value in maintaining healthy democracies and societies overall. Craft Gin Club charge £40 for the same size bottle of gin; their goodies are usually well worth the additional £5 (the retail value of the items in their box is usually in the £50 range) but only if you value them. Personally I appreciate the mixers, especially when they are chosen to complement the gin, but I could take or leave the snacks (I wasn’t blown away by the sweets, popcorn and seaweed thins I received with competitors’ boxes). The miniature boxes average at about £5 per 5cl, which equates to £70 for 70cl; a cost most people would balk at (though of course you only actually pay between £10 and £28.50 per box). Obviously, it’s impossible to know which gins The Juniper Club will offer in future but with Wight Mermaids Gin retailing at £35.95 plus delivery from Master of Malt and 31Dover, this still looks like a good deal (as long as you like the surprise element). Allen arrived in the Republic of Texas at a time when the young nation was still in the process of establishing itself. Allen, like many young men of the time, was drawn to Texas by the promise of land and the opportunities to establish a new life in a frontier territory. Upon his arrival, Allen began to explore the possibilities of the Texas frontier, and he quickly recognized the potential of the land around the Clear Lake and Galveston Bay areas. The Allen Ranch was established a few years after the Texas Revolution, and it quickly became a cornerstone of the local economy. texts.full_text: into the resonant circuit. The capacitance of the variable-capacitance diodes is changed depending on the regulating voltage, as a result of which the total capacitance of the resonant circuit and thus the resonant frequency are changed. Continuous alteration of the resonant frequency is possible with such a device. However, such a device enables only capacitive changes of the resonant circuit properties. Since, moreover, the depletion layer in variable-capacitance diodes assumes the function of a capacitor, only slight changing of the capacitances is possible with such a device. In addition, variable-capacitance diodes have large component tolerances. Their blocking behavior and, consequently, their capacitance are changed by the influence of temperature, as a result of which the field of application of such variable-capacitance diodes is very limited. In a further device which is known from German Patent DE 44 38 287 C1, corresponding to U.S. patent application Ser. No. 08/847,866, filed Apr. 28, 1997, a plurality of capacitors are connected in parallel with the resonant circuit in order to match the resonant frequency to the excitation frequency. However, such a device does not enable continuous, but rather only stepwise matching of the resonant circuit. The sodium is forced to move down and up in the oxide layer (push-down and pull-up) and then the sodium is either detected as: (1) a change in net charge imaged on the silicon surface (before and after sodium movement) or (2) a change in integrated ionic current (before and after sodium movement) or (3) as a momentary ionic current (during sodium movement). Although widely accepted, the MOS methods have increasingly unacceptable high cost and excessive time associated with the MOS sample preparation. For monitoring thick oxides, the sample preparation time for aluminum MOS electrodes can be 1-2 days and for thin oxides, the cost and time for fabricating polysilicon electrodes is even worse. Furthermore, the fabrication process for these MOS electrodes can become a source for sodium or other measurement complications. U.S. Pat. No. 5,498,974, which is incorporated herein by reference, teaches a method and apparatus for measuring mobile charge in an oxide layer on semiconductor wafers using corona charge. A corona gun is used to deposit a measured quantity of charge on the oxide surface and then a Kelvin probe is used to measure the potential of the oxide surface. The wafer is alternately situated under the corona gun and then under the Kelvin probe until a series of values of potentials are reached. The mobile charge measurement is based on the difference between the actual charge required to achieve a desired potential and the theoretical amount of charge required for zero mobile charges. A method for measuring mobile charge in a dielectric layer on a substrate includes applying at least one first polarity corona bias temperature stress cycle to the layer, applying successive second polarity corona bias temperature stress cycles to the layer and measuring a corresponding voltage drop until the voltage drops approach a terminal value, and determining the mobile charge according to the voltage drops. texts.full_text: this appeal Argento challenges the sufficiency evidence that he knowingly possessed methamphetamine with intent distribute it; rather than merely knowing about its presence, which was known to others who were staying in his home. The government's case rested largely on circumstantial evidences including: (i) drugs and paraphernalia found at Argento’s house after a search warrant had been executed there following an investigation of illegal drug activities; (ii) the testimony from two individuals that he knew about these items when they were discovered by police officers during this same incident. The evidence presented was certainly enough for reasonable minds to conclude, as did here judge and jury at trial below. Argento also contends his rights under Miranda v Arizona have been violated in connection with a statement made after being advised of those right but before he signed the waiver form that accompanied them; however these contentions are meritless. Arganto's statements were not coerced, nor did they result from any improper interrogation techniques. LastlyArgento argues his sentence was unreasonably harsh given as it is a 20-year term which exceeds by far what would have been imposed had he only the charges of drug possession and carrying firearms in connection with that crime. texts.full_text: It sounds like you're trying to handle cookies in a `fetch` response in a `React Native` application, but you're encountering a string where all cookies are joined with a comma, instead of a `Set-Cookie` header with separate cookies. Here's how you can handle this: ### Parsing `Set-Cookie` Headers in `fetch` Response 1. Access `Set-Cookie` Headers: The `fetch` API in `React Native` can handle `Set-Cookie` headers. However, `fetch` does not automatically parse `Set-Cookie` headers into a `Set-Cookie` array. Instead, you can access the `Set-Cookie` headers manually. 2. Extract and Parse Cookies: You can extract the `Set-Cookie` headers and parse them into a usable array. Here’s a step-by-step example: ```javascript async function fetchWithCookies(url, options = {}) { const response = await fetch(url, options); // Get the headers const headers = response.headers; // Get the `Set-Cookie` headers const setCookies = headers.getAll('Set-Cookie'); // Parse the `Set-Cookie` headers const cookies = setCookies.flatMap(cookie => cookie.split(', ')); // If the cookies are still joined, split them const parsedCookies = cookies.flatMap(cookie => cookie.split('; ')); // If you want to convert them to an object const cookieObject = parsedCookies.reduce((acc, cookie) => { const [key, value] = cookie.split('='); acc[key] = value; return acc; }, {}); // Return the response, parsed cookies, and cookie object return { response, cookies, cookieObject, }; } // Usage fetchWithCookies('https://example.com/api') .then(({ response, cookies, cookieObject }) => { console.log('Cookies:', cookies); console.log('Cookie Object:', cookieObject); // Handle response }) .catch(error => { console.error('Error:', error); }); ``` ### Explanation: 1. `headers.getAll('Set-Cookie')`: - This retrieves an array of `Set-Cookie` headers. If there are multiple `Set-Cookie` headers, they will be in an array. If there is only one, it will be an array with one element. 2. `flatMap`: - `flatMap` is used to flatten the array of `Set-Cookie` headers. texts.full_text: homes.) Notice that the frames do not all "match," but rather harmonize? I think this really suggests a collection that evolved over time instead of something put together in a day. And the frames and mats seem to have been chosen to best highlight the art, rather than adhering to a single aesthetic. The result feels like a conversation between pieces—each frame and mat adding a unique voice to the space. From a distance, the wall becomes a patchwork of color, texture, and history. Muted gold mats frame delicate watercolors of Southern gardens, while weathered, carved wooden frames anchor vintage textiles or abstract prints with bold colors. It’s a mix of eras and styles, yet the palette remains anchored in warm neutrals and soft greens that echo the surrounding landscape of the Hemlock Springs Idea House. What strikes me most is how personal the arrangement feels. A small, gilded French frame holds a childhood sketch, while a larger, industrial metal frame showcases a contemporary geometric print. The layering—some pieces floated higher or staggered deliberately—creates a rhythm that invites you to move closer, discovering how each item relates to its neighbor. texts.full_text: arethere of rolling a die six times in a row such that there are at least four consecutive threes? Let $R_i$ be the event that there are four consecutive threes beginning in the $i$th position, where $1 \leq i\leq 3$. Notice that theword exactly was not used in the description of $R_i$. Observe that to have five consecutive threes, there are two possibilities: There must be four consecutive threes beginning in the firstposition and four consecutive threes beginning in the second position. There must be four consecutive threes beginningin the first position and four consecutive threes beginning in the third position. To have six consecutive threes, there must be four consecutive threes beginning in the first position and four consecutive threes beginning in the second position and four consecutive threes beginning in the third position. Thus, the set of events in which at least four consecutive threes are rolled is $R_1 \cup R_2 \cupR_3$. Bythe Inclusion-Exclusion Principle,$$|R_1 \cup R_2 \cup R_3| = |R_1| + |R_2| + |R_3| - |R_1 \cap R_2| - |R_1 \cap R_3| -|R_2 \cap R_3| + |R_1 \cap R_2 \cap R_3|$$ $|R_1|$: Each of the first four positions must be filled with a $3$. The remaining two positions can each be filled in six ways.Hence,$|R_1| = 6^2$. By symmetry, $|R_1| = |R_2| = |R_3|$. $|R_1 \cap R_2|$: Each of the first five positions must be filled with a $3$. The remaining position can be filled in six ways. Hence, $|R_1 \capR_2| = 6$. By symmetry, $|R_1 \cap R_2| = |R_2 \cap R_3|$. $|R_1 \cap R_3|$: Each of the six positions must be filled with a $3$.

texts.full_text: Staff - November 28, 2018 - 05:37 Iranian Foreign Minister Mohammad Javad Zarif has sat down with Director General of the World Intellectual Property Organization (WIPO) Francis Gurry in Geneva. In the Tuesday meeting, the two sides discussed mutual cooperation as well as the current international trends in the domain of intellectual property. During the discussions, the top Iranian diplomat touched upon Iran’s plans to move from an oil-and-gas-driven economy to a knowledge-based one, highlighting the importance of intellectual property during the course of this trend. For a brief review of Iran’s achievements in various fields of science and technology, check the book “Science and Technology in Iran: A Brief Review” He attached special importance to multilateralism on the international stage, and said unilateral measures as well as illegal sanctions are destructive factors affecting the progress and development of societies when it comes to science and technology. The WIPO chief, in turn, presented a report on the latest international trends in the domain of intellectual property. He referred to the most important challenges facing the international community in that field, and lauded Iran as an active member in international organizations and with regards to multilateralism. TAGS Intellectual Property Mohammad Javad Zarif Foreign Ministry IFP Editorial Staff https://ifpnews.com/ifp-editorial-staff/ The IFP Editorial Staff is composed of dozens of skilled journalists, news-writers, and analysts whose works are edited and published by experienced editors. The editor of each IFP Service is responsible for the report published by the Iran Front Page (IFP) news website, and can be contacted through the ways mentioned in the "IFP Editorial Staff" section. It seems like you're setting the minimumInteritemSpacing to 0, but it might still be showing some space due to the contentInset or other factors. Here are a few things you can try: 1. Set contentInset to UIEdgeInsetsZero: Since you're setting the minimum spacings to 0, there's no need for additional inset. ```swift _collectionView.contentInset = UIEdgeInsetsZero; ``` 2. Set estimatedSize: If your item sizes vary dynamically, you might want to use estimatedSize instead of itemSize. With UNESCO as lead agency, IYL 2015 programs will promote improved public and political understanding of the central role of light in the modern world while also celebrating noteworthy anniversaries in 2015—from the first studies of optics 1,000 years ago to discoveries in optical communications that power the Internet today.
